title: Mexican Tagliatelle Fiesta
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Mexican-inspired pasta dish. The combination of fresh ingredients and tangy flavors will transport you to the vibrant streets of Mexico.
instructions: Cook the tagliatelle according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes, cumin, and a pinch of salt to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced snap peas and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until tender.
Stir in the pasta sauce, lime juice, and crumbled feta cheese.
Add the cooked tagliatelle to the skillet and toss everything together until well combined.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
